title: Assistant Manager, Food Services Operations (Healthcare Industry)
description:
• Opportunities for professional development 
  • Reputable healthcare organisation
  • Competitive Remuneration Package

As an Assistant Manager, Food Services Operations (Healthcare Industry), you will be responsible for the following duties:

  • Oversee end-to-end food service operations to ensure safe, timely, and seamless meal delivery.
  • Manage daily operational workflows across food preparation support, assembly, catering, and storage functions.
  • Plan, recruit, deploy, and schedule manpower to meet service and operational requirements.
  • Ensure staff compliance through training, onboarding, and vaccination readiness.
  • Manage food service contracts and monitor vendor performance against service level agreements.
  • Identify and mitigate risks related to food safety, workplace safety, fire safety, and business continuity.
  • Collaborate with culinary and production teams to support inpatient, staff, and catering meals.
  • Drive continuous improvement initiatives in workflow efficiency, automation, waste reduction, and sustainability.
  • Handle escalated service issues, patient feedback, and complaints professionally.
  • Prepare operational reports, verify monthly service payments, and maintain accurate documentation.

Requirements:

  • Degree in Food & Beverage Management, Hospitality, Nutrition, or a related discipline.
  • Certification in Food Hygiene; ISO 22000, ISO 45001, and MUIS Halal certification will be an added advantage.


To apply, simply click on the “apply” button in the job advertisement or alternatively, you can send in your resume via email
Email Address: APPLY@ALLIEDSEARCH.COM.SG

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

ALLIED SEARCH PTE. LTD.

EA LICENSE : 19C9777
